title: leontodon preslii
intro: Leontodon preslii, also known as Preslie's Hawksbeard, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Leontodon preslii can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
